data.title: US Biotech Company Aditxt Adds Digital Asset Financial Strategy to S-1 Registration Document
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: American biotech company Aditxt, Inc. (ADTX) updated its S-1 registration document, which added "digital asset financial strategy". It is reported that Bitcoin is mentioned as many as 302 times in the document.

data.title: Aditxt, Inc. Incorporates Digital Asset Strategy in S-1 Filing
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. healthcare company Aditxt, Inc. (ADTX) has updated its S-1 registration document to include a 'digital asset financial strategy.' The filing mentions Bitcoin 302 times, indicating a significant focus on digital assets in the company's financial planning.

data.title: Labubu's price plummets in the second-hand market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Affected by the official restocking, the price of Labubu in the second-hand market plummeted. Data from a certain trendy second-hand trading software showed that the recycling price of a whole box of Labubu3.0 dropped from 1,500 yuan to 2,800 yuan to 650 yuan to 800 yuan. Previously, some scalpers relied on order-grabbing software to stock up and sold at a premium of more than 10 times, but the official large-scale restocking broke the scarcity expectations and the market sold off. (Jinshi)

data.description:
The initiative was announced Friday and includes contributions from top teams such as Uniswap Labs, Morpho, Maple Finance, Kiln, and […] The post Ethereum Developers Launch Web3SOC to Standardize Security and Compliance in DeFi appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: Belgravia Hartford increased its Bitcoin holdings through OTC, with its holdings rising to approximately 6.39 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Belgravia Hartford, a Canadian listed company, announced that it has increased its holdings of 1.5316351 BTC through the over-the-counter trading desk. This is the company's second Bitcoin purchase transaction, and its total Bitcoin reserves have reached 6.39316479 so far. Earlier this month, Belgravia Hartford obtained a $5 million credit financing specifically for Bitcoin purchases, but this transaction used the company's own funds. (Businesswire)

data.title: Morgan Stanley: Offshore RMB stablecoin will verify the actual use case of cross-border settlement
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Morgan Stanley's latest research report pointed out that the relevant policies of the Hong Kong Stablecoin Act have essentially paved the first legal path for offshore RMB stablecoins. Supported by Hong Kong's deep offshore liquidity pool of about 1 trillion yuan, offshore RMB stablecoins will verify the actual use cases of cross-border settlements. The development of RMB stablecoins should be regarded as a potential component of cross-border RMB settlement infrastructure, including RMB swap agreements, CIPS (Cross-border RMB Interbank Payment System) and the global RMB clearing service network. (Ming Pao)

data.title: A whale deposited 3.77 million USDC to Hyperliquid and bought 107,865 HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 3.77 million USDC into Hyperliquid and bought 107,865 HYPEs at an average price of US$34.96.

data.title: A whale spent 10 million USDC to buy 4,170 ETH at an average price of $2,400
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale borrowed 10 million USDC from Aave four hours ago, and then bought 4,170 ETH at $2,400. The whale previously spent 86.79 million USDC on June 12 to buy 31,458 ETH at $2,759.

data.title: AI startup Cluely completes $15 million in financing, with a16z participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AI startup Cluely announced the completion of a $15 million financing, with a16z participating in the investment. It is reported that Cluely is a company that develops artificial intelligence tools. Its core product is an undetectable AI assistant that can provide instant support in interviews, sales calls, meetings and other scenarios by monitoring the user's screen and audio in real time. (BusinessInsider)

data.title: Du Jun: The essence of stablecoins at this stage is arbitrage and payment tools
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Du Jun wrote on the X platform that the AI ​​market is fierce and funds are pouring into the US stock market. BTC ETF trading volume has accounted for 25% of spot trading. If there are more ETFs, the chain and the currency circle may only have the functions of liquidation and warehouse transfer. CEX's trading volume in the first half of the year was halved by 40% compared with the second half of last year, and the TVL on the chain remained flat and there was no movement. The essence of stablecoins at this stage is arbitrage and payment tools, not an incremental engine for liquidity. The larger the issuance volume, the more money will be pumped.

data.title: AI Surge Drives Capital Flow into U.S. Stocks, Impacting Crypto Markets
data.description:
According to Odaily, Du Jun recently commented on the X platform about the aggressive movement in AI markets, noting a continuous influx of capital into U.S. stocks. He highlighted that the trading volume of Bitcoin ETFs now accounts for 25% of spot transactions. With the introduction of more ETFs, the blockchain and cryptocurrency sectors may be reduced to mere functions of liquidation and asset transfer.

Du Jun also pointed out that the trading volume on centralized exchanges (CEX) in the first half of the year has decreased by 40% compared to the latter half of last year. Meanwhile, the total value locked (TVL) on-chain remains stagnant, showing no significant activity.

Furthermore, he remarked that stablecoins currently serve primarily as tools for arbitrage and payment, rather than as engines for liquidity growth. He warned that as the issuance of stablecoins increases, the pressure on liquidity extraction intensifies.

data.title: A certain address held 2,313 ETH and sold them in panic after one month, resulting in a loss of $326,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a certain address panicked and sold ETH after holding it for a month, losing $326,000. The address bought 2,313 ETH on the chain at a cost of $2,532.87 on May 19, worth $5.85 million, and had a floating profit of $800,000 during the period. When the price plummeted this morning, it was reluctant to sell at a loss at $2,391.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming bought a total of 6,744 ETH worth $16.51 million in the past four days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, SharpLink Gaming has bought a total of 6,744 ETH worth $16.51 million through Galaxy Digital in the past 4 days. They should have spent $493 million to buy and hold 188,000 ETH (US$456.9 million), with a total cost of about $2,617, and currently have a floating loss of about $37.5 million.

data.title: Warning Issued Over Fake Cold Wallet Giveaway Scams
data.description: According to PANews, a recent alert has been issued by SlowMist CISO 23pds regarding a new type of cryptocurrency scam involving fake cold wallet giveaways. Scammers are impersonating official accounts on the X platform, claiming to offer free Ledger cold wallets. These fraudsters send out seemingly genuine, sealed devices to lure users into a false sense of security. The real danger often lies within the device itself or the accompanying 'initialization guide,' which may be tampered with or designed to trick users into revealing their mnemonic phrases through social engineering tactics.

data.title: Market News: Trump plans to attend the National Security Meeting at 6 a.m. tomorrow
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: US President Trump will attend the National Security Meeting at 6 am Beijing time on Sunday. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale cleared his position at the high point and bought 4153.84 ETH 6 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Odaily Planet Daily According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the whale who built a position of 10 million US dollars of ETH yesterday decisively liquidated 3983 ETH in the upward trend 18 hours ago, selling at a price of 2535.88 US dollars, costing 2510.67 US dollars, and making a profit of 100,000 US dollars. 6 hours ago, the whale bought 4153.84 ETH again at the starting point of the rebound at an average price of 2419.48 US dollars, and currently has a floating profit of 30,000 US dollars.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: Beware of cold wallet crypto scams disguised as official giveaways
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist CISO @im23pds posted on the X platform, saying to be wary of cold wallet crypto lottery scams disguised as official ones. Criminals impersonated official accounts on the X platform, claiming to give away cold wallets such as Ledger for free, and actually sent out "new and sealed" real devices to induce users to relax their vigilance. The real trap is often hidden in the device itself or in the attached initialization instructions, which may be tampering with the device, or inducing users to disclose mnemonics through social engineering.

data.title: SEC meets with Dinari to discuss details of proposal for multi-chain tokenized securities trading system
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that it has met with representatives of blockchain finance company Dinari and Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr law firm. The two sides discussed ways to solve problems related to the regulation of crypto assets, including providing more details on its proposal to operate a tokenized securities trading system that supports multiple blockchains, as well as the legal framework for the operation of the system.

data.title: SEC Engages with Dinari on Blockchain Securities Regulation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has held discussions with representatives from blockchain financial company Dinari and the law firm Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr. The meeting focused on addressing regulatory issues related to crypto assets. Key topics included exploring methods to regulate a proposed system for trading tokenized securities across multiple blockchains and understanding the legal framework governing its operation.

data.title: CoinMarketCap Removes Malicious Code After Security Breach
data.description: According to Odaily, CoinMarketCap announced on the X platform that it has identified and removed malicious code from its website. The team is actively investigating the incident and implementing measures to enhance security. Previously, CoinMarketCap's front end was attacked, resulting in a malicious pop-up window prompting users to 'verify wallet.' CoinMarketCap later tweeted that the malicious code had been removed and all systems were restored to normal, although the tweet was subsequently deleted.
